which preceded my experience, the orthomolecular vitamins, esp. the overdose (7 grams a day) of C is crucial, in regards to improving and synchronizing neural firing. The possibility is also there of a diuretic factor, a flushing of something out of the neural tissues, a built-up toxin, etc. It's never occurred to me, but sodium pentathoi is "truth drug." Due to it and other factors I was de-hypnotized and revered to —became— my true self; recall, I sensed having just come from a cool moist climate. What this all says is: WE ARE NOT REALLY HERE; THE DOKOS, THIS WORLD, OBSCURES THE REAL WORLD. I have the extraordinary insight that I suddenly saw things are the;* really are. Which (get this!) is in biblical terms, scenes, persons, events. The world of the Bible was suddenly around me, and real, replacing our world. And I knew Koinos Greek, the lingua franca of that time. What could explain that? I had just received the "truth drug"... I guess —I make the supreme leap here in thinking about this— I guess that in reality it is Biblical times, the Bible is a printout of the real world, true in the empirical "landscape" sense, not in the past or gone; what we see is dokos, a veil. Only surface manfestation; the thing-in-itself, actuality, true reality, is the landscape and entities of the Bible, exactly as depicted in the Bible; I judges around the time of Acts or a bit later, 70 A.D. maybe. I then did not go there (obviously) or even remember, really, but discerned as here. This is a radical idealistic epistemology, because I say, They’re showing us endless color 3-D vistavision movies of a world of 1974/6, but ain’t so. That is illusion (vide Brahmanism). What is so is the Bible. The veil of illusion, the hypnotic trance, fell away, and another landscape emerged, and I identified it; at the same time I fell into naturally uttering the tongue of those times, and performed the customs of those times; anamnesis: it all came back to me; I remembered not what was past but what is NOW. We are provided —given— the scriptures as key, as clue, to this, and told they are real, inspired by God, and to believe them. (This explanation of 3-74 fits in with my lifetime of doubting my senses, as expressed in my novels & stories.) (Which is to say, I sensed all this at previous times, but not lucidly.) They're watching us down here in our toy painted dokos maze, and when we pass we're shown the Truth, how it really is; we get to see, as I did. Was I gradually or stage by stage figuring it out over the years? To a degree: I suspected. But I think I was suddenly jerked out of the maze "ahead of time," so to speak for reasons I don't know, probably connected with (1) the Xerox letter, (2) the tyranny, which relates to (1) and (3) my writing. I must hang on to this thought: everything I experienced which seemed an epiphany, extraordinary, was actually the way things really are — always. It all constellates around ceasing to be blind, for the first time in my life, and being suddenly able to see. I keep rejecting this realization in terms of assuming exceptional events, scenes, entities manifesting themselves (but now gone). What has happened is that I've sunk back among the blind...but I remember; I once saw. I am saying that my partial view (AD 1974 Calif) was not replaced by another partial view (Rome AD 70) but by absolute reality itself. If this explanation is the correct one, then I have the strong intuition that when the Judgment Day comes it will be characterized by the dokos curtain rolling up and exposing that very landscape to everyone

2 nowhere, except in Brahmanism, do I fires a descrip tit of the immanent all prevading disure stuff which I saw as the living force of causality, shining on the faces of the animals in the trash of the gutter in the stars - always in + behind, + subjectively experienced internally inside myself as an instructing tutular voice of that which was aware + seeing the divine without which (ay behind the phenomenological world; viz: "Brahman transforms itself into the universe or assumes its appearance?" Because of maya we are fooled into seen the phenomenological world as real, but, as I saw in 3-74, there is nothing there but Brahman "who assumes (the various) appearances. Here + here only do I find an explanation for what I saw: in 3-74 I stopped hypostatizing, + there lay the divine stuff in place of why thing. The they were gone; the it shone throughs from what had been high, low, me, not me small carge, important trivial. Liberation, not theoretical but actual. This is the universe organism which I perceived to be the macrocosm alive + unitary. Also it is belicued in Hinduism that all this is personified - by vishws. If by he who is called Vishnu then we com call this Christ - the personification to the western world, in terms of our linear-time cultural oneels + v.P. All I can say at this point is that I saw this because the Atman in me is identical with the external world: the (my) projection machiner turned off dering my descent + integration - it (maya) was involved in the mainterance of the phenomenological world, so that departes, briefly, but for long enough. So I encountered: 1) The Atman (inner divine possessing personality + guiding voice) 2) Maya - I knew it when it left 3) Brahman - which the Atman saw ubiquitously outside 4) + my Roman life memories point to transmigration + 5) my deed vis-a-vis the Xerox letter points to Karma. All the major elements of Brahmanism! I

1494-21 Logos deprint My new religion turns out to be the oldest known. "The Buddha is in the park" may not have pointer to brahaminism specifically, but it did point to a trans‐ supra- Christion divinity. B: "the veil of Maya prevents a man from remembering his true origin + purpose." Wow - then indeed the veil of Maya was forn away for me in 3-74, + not just in regard to the presot phenomenal world, but as to my true origin + purpose. EB: "Maya means wizardy (as well as illusion"). It goes away when the empirical (?) ego goes away - which, as I have long realized, is exactly what 1) happened to me in 3-74; my ego died (was annihilated, abolished This was a tereying + painful experience - I hung onto it - but look what came as a result! Inner transformation + Gnosis (inc. anamnesis), outer awareness of Brahman I may have lost my family + my gieffrent but I I have seen Brahman, + linked up with it. As I realize 8 on my last acid trip "sum Atman Dei" - for dues" real "Brahman" - partial anamnesis may have occured - did occur then: even a correct word. Therefore I am liberated (in the Hindu serse): Brahmanism teaches that such knowledge (enlightenment) determines that, upon death, one will not be reborn - on the wheel - but will go to Brahman - i.e. be reabsorbed; this is the part I dreamed of the adorable void my God + home. I got a taste of the after life as my Atman diffused back into Brahman the beatific vision, which is the goal of all religions (or should be). there cannot be any higher goal. When it is said that the Atman + Brahman are identical it does not mean that they resemble each other, even absolutely - it says they are one: my Atman inside me is the Brahman outside. This explams (I think) why I felt myself to be an enormous, divine, avatar-like immortal entity who came here from the stars. The Atman inside me

The fact that the veil of maya lifted for me is proved by my recovert memories -as well as my ceasing to be "blind" inner + outer delusion departed. Karmic burder produces maya + Maya removes our memories of our real dentity + purpose. I somehow correct handling of the Xerox letter caused me to obtain the judgment of release - it offset + cancelled out my karmic burden, however acquired. Brahmanism teaches that few are released, but some are, + it is our real goal, since then we can return to Brahman (God). This shows the importance of what happened to me in 3-74. Its proper significance (or now be appreciated; without the above analysis it cant be understood. Having choser correctly I then was granted the greatest gift a living person can receive: I saw the deity all around me, + experienced him (or it) inwardly: I heard that wonderous still small voice. This religious explanation is the correct one. I prefer the Hindre exegesis, but a Christian one will do, too : it adds the reali bation of the role of Christ: because of him + him alone I was able to choose rightly; it was he who acted as my guide, teacher + advocate at that trial, who informed me. He it was who spoke for me when I called up to L.A. + wrote letters. For Karmic burden read "sin" or "original sin." The E.B. says that the highest level you can rise to (ascend to) is that of Lord Krishna - whereupon one achieves Nirvana. i.e. to a God-like, avatar like level. Was I for a time, at the level of great Krishna himself? The point here is that here it is shown how high, how extraordinarily high, one may rise - to the level of a God. While still physically a mere man. Ah! No wonder I saw people with 3 eyes, Krishna is so depicted krsna is the 8th incarnation of Vishna. He danced played the flute + was full of love. He reminds me of Orpheus.

8 But the really stacking evidence that God had for me abolished time was the reappearance - to me - of Rome, + also Babylon. The 3 citter are one + the same separated only by time. God (for me) removed true, + the s cities became one. Most important, if this removal of the was/is to have importance, a person from the Roman time would have to return with it - + so one did: Thomas. Thus in my case, a micro example, we can see that the essence of salvation is the abolition (freeing from) time, + what the results of that abolution of time are. The past - + peoph frame the past - retrieved (returned to life). All this is amazingly like the regressions in Ubik my long continuity of memory (anamnesis) seems to ratify the Brahman - Buddhist view (+ Essene): the soul tangled in matter, having come down here from the stars (more accurately the pleroma), + through the revelation of the secret knowledge of divine origin - + the unreality of this world - prees me. An error in judgment - by me + others as divine sparks was made thousands of years ago. But: the Christian or Zoroashion element of the Savior is there, too; he who awakens, i.e. gives the Gnosis + hence frees me - from time, hence death + this process will be complete after death; I can go home instead of being reborn. Also, the retrieval of Rome c. 70 AD shows how God can achieve salvation for us. If this world is irreal, he can abolish +/or transform it - Rok it back through an orthogona time axis as in Ubik, + revive (e.g. "Thomas") the anciled dead to life. My 3-74 experience shows that time is a property of an irreal world, hence its dominion over us is in a sense like the world itself irreal; we merely give assent to the existence of both this world (Empirical reality) + time, handing coercive power over to them, which the Savior Christ can breat. It would appear the the Gnostic (Christian) salvific revelation (+ display of the saviors power over time is, incredibly, a revelation of the Hindo notion of immanent Brahman + the irreality of This world; thus I combine Gnostic Xtianity + Brahmanism.

God; they are the Light God in pluriform, his way of invading the lower realm in disguise. The Light God (the divine) has now crucially occupied critical stations in the sinking lower realm, + begins to re-annex it back into the totality composed of both realms. The sinking ceases; the Master Magician is stripped of his autonomy + assimilated to the Yang part of the Godhead as its passive counterpart, + once more there is one macrocosm ruled by the Yang or active (creative) Light God assisted by the now receptive Yin (dark) side. The divine has triumphed at all levels; the prison is burst, + the vast, light-filled Garden Kingdom restored as the home of all creatures. These now whole creatures, composed equally of Yin + Yang, are what I term homoplasmates: the Yin part is homo (as we know ourselves to be now, only) + the light or Yang part is the plasmate or energy part (vs the physical). Thus renewed + complete microcosms mirroring the renewed + complete macrocosm are achieved. Reality is imparted to the otherwise irreal lower realm + the upper realm now extends physically - into the realm of matter. The integrity of the Godhead is restored; its two halves function in harmony; + the primordial split (or crisis) is healed. This is a view compounded of Zoroastrianism, Brahmanism, Gnosticism, Taoism, the macro-microcosm of Hermes Tristmigistus + other mystery religions, + not very much of orthodox Xtianity. Xtianity can be added if the pluriform microsparks of light are considered plural saviors or Christs comprising a single mystical corpus which is distributed widely in the dark realm but possessing only one psyche which is somehow also God, the Yang or Light God.

I get the impression that the Free Variable is judicious in its presentation of disclusure. It (a if it wishes leave us absolutely bound to this system of things (i.e program), which is to say the "weary wheel of maya + karma." Thus I affirm the basic truth of all the religions which teach salvation: xtianity, Gnosticism, Brahmanism, Buddhism, Neo-Platonism, + the Greco-Roman mystery religions + Manichaism, + Zoroastrianism. All earthly goals + values (those arising within the program) pale into mere delusion in contrast to the value of this salvation: they are literally dokos.

The xtian doctrine of vicarious atonement + human sin only makes sense if one realizes that since the Paraclete discloses the true situation (via the gnosis) to relatively few people, the Mass of Mankind - virtually all humans - would remain bound within the program otherwise. The death on the cross is a hot-wiring of the Salvific Act to make it generally applicable. Anything less would be inhumane, + not in keeping with the loving nature of the Godhead. By studying the fact of Christ's voluntary death we can apprehend the reality of this love + know we are safe although not by our own efforts.

As correctly put forth in "Valis" the Free Variable has invaded the program to restore sanity i.e. rationality to the Macro-Brain (i.e the Binary Computer - expressed in "Valis" as the "two source cosmogony"). Also put forth correctly: The Empire is the personification of the irrational component (stasis or complex). So the Free Variable attackes it in the form of phagocytosis - or, as I conceive it now, as a metabolic toxin; a dissolving agent which is sentient + alive (+ wise).
